cclogistics:logistics_coordinator.job.de: The Logistics Coordinator stands at the Town Hall and relays colony requests to the Logistics network.
cclogistics:packer_agent.job.desc: The Packer Agent moves items between the Freight Depot and the Warehouse, boxing and unboxing them.
cclogistics:freight_inspector.job.desc: The Freight Inspector monitors incoming and outgoing logistics tasks.
cclogistics:logistics_coordinator.skills: Benefits from high Knowledge and Agility to process requests faster.
cclogistics:packer_agent.skills.desc: Benefits from high Stamina and Agility to move packages quickly.
cclogistics:freight_inspector.skills.des: Benefits from high Intelligence and Knowledge to accurately inspect manifests.
com.cclogistics.research.logistics.name: Logistics
com.cclogistics.research.stock_tablets.s: Unlock the ability to instant request.
com.cclogistics.research.effects.stock_t: The Stock Tablet allows your Logistics Coordinator to request from anywhere, just toggle the switch.
advancement.cclogistics.eat_ballast.desc: You actually ate the train track ballast. Why? Did Amrris tell you to do it?
Build a Freight Depot and prepare to automate your supply lines.
advancement.cclogistics.gotta_go_fast.de: Craft a Logistics Path and enjoy the speed.
advancement.cclogistics.hello_darkness_m: Craft an Illuminated Logistics Path and enjoy the speed and the light.
advancement.cclogistics.ive_got_the_need: I've Got The Need For Speed!
advancement.cclogistics.laying_groundwor: Craft Railway Ballast to decorate your new train depot.
advancement.cclogistics.mind_the_gap.des: Obtain a Track Clearance block to protect your citizens from high-speed trains.
advancement.cclogistics.paper_pusher.des: Set up a Foremen's Hut to track your live shipping manifests.
advancement.cclogistics.rainbow_track.de: Collect all 14 colors of Railway Ballast.
advancement.cclogistics.root.title: Create: Colony Logistics
advancement.cclogistics.root.desc: Bridge the gap between your automated factories and your growing town.
advancement.cclogistics.same_day_shippin: Obtain a Logistics Controller to enable Express Package routing.
advancement.cclogistics.wifi_broke.title: The WiFi is Broke
advancement.cclogistics.wifi_broke.desc: Craft a Logistics Linker to manually pair your factory to your colony.
